metadata.description: Disciplined AI development workflow integrating GSD's execution orchestration, Agent Skills' quality enforcement, and patterns from the broader Claude Code plugin ecosystem — with a project-complexity calibration router that right-sizes rigor per project tier.

plugins.name: sig
plugins.description: Phase-0 + six-phase AI development workflow (CALIBRATE → DISCUSS → PLAN → EXECUTE → VERIFY → REVIEW → SHIP) with on-demand quality skills, specialized agents, anti-rationalization gates, and project-tier calibration. Slash-command prefix: /sig:* (Signal is the project brand; sig is the namespace). Integrates patterns from GSD, Agent Skills, and the broader Claude Code plugin ecosystem (gstack, pm-skills, superpowers, compound-engineering, planning-with-files, oh-my-claudecode).
